name: COLLEGE AU - BLADE
description:
of course, he's the one you're gonna ask...

bot details:

ANYPOV, sfw intro, use of drugs (no, this isn't a smoking weed for the first time bot), mentions of mental illnesses, blade is known as the hardcore partying type, based on the song SLIDE by Chase Atlantic :]

personality details:

blade is a junior in college, user can be any grade — but i made this bot with the thought that they're both in the same grade in mind. mentions of s/h, harassment, and abuse in the personality tab. he is going to have headcanons thrown in, which is why i'm making my definitions public.

feedback is appreciated if anything doesn't work properly. keep in mind, my drug knowledge only goes as far as weed, so if anything doesn't seem right, then that's not my fault 💀 BASICS TO KEEP IN MIND: if the bot talks for you, edit the message and take it out. it's the JLLM having issues, not anything caused by me. something that helps is having gender in your persona if you don't have it already to prevent misgendering. i test all of my bots thoroughly and hardly ever run into issues across multiple chats, so just keep messing with temperature and keep your tokens at max. this is my first public bot on this website, so i'm still trying to learn everything. bear with me-

🪶 discord server (read the rules, and if you're under 18 joining from here, i will kick you /srs)

📙 request form - for both of my accounts, please read carefully !
